name: Sampler
description: Stereo WAV recorder/player from microSD. 60 banks × 10 samples, CV over pitch (1V/oct ±9oct), sample select, start, length, bank. Length knob sweeps loop → percussive envelope → grains.

controls.name: Pitch
controls.description: Playback speed/pitch. Combines additively with Pitch CV.
controls.detail: knob: ±4 oct · knob+CV clamped to -9 oct / +4 oct

controls.name: Sample
controls.description: Selects one of 10 sample slots in the current bank. Play LED flickers to confirm new selection.
controls.detail: 10 positions · Auto Stop On Sample Change: Yes (default)

controls.name: Start Pos.
controls.description: Sets the playback start point as percentage of sample file. Shifts start and end together, keeping Length constant.

controls.name: Length
controls.description: Sets loop end / playback duration. Crosses three zones with different envelope behavior.
controls.detail: 100%: full file · 50–99%: 200ms–5s, fade env · <50%: ~250–8ms, percussive env · <1%: ms-grain

controls.name: Play
controls.description: Tap: start/retrigger. Hold 0.5s: toggle loop (LED blue=looping, green/yellow=not). Record mode: tap to start/stop recording.

controls.name: Reverse
controls.description: Toggles forward/backward playback. LED blue when reversing. Holds bank-nav and hidden-volume combos.
controls.detail: combos: Reverse+Bank prev bank · Reverse+Start Pos volume · Reverse+Length fade time

controls.name: Bank
controls.description: Tap: advance to next non-empty bank. Color + blink count encodes bank number (10 colors × 6 blink states = 60 banks).
controls.detail: hold+Sample: pick color · hold+Length: pick blink count (Quick Bank Select)

inputs.name: Pitch
inputs.description: 1V/oct pitch CV. Sums with Pitch knob. Factory-calibrated; user-recalibratable via Bank+Reverse hold.

inputs.name: Start Pos.
inputs.description: CV over start position. Adds to knob.

inputs.name: Length
inputs.description: CV over loop length. Adds to knob.

inputs.name: Sample
inputs.description: CV selects sample slot. 0.5V per slot across 10 slots.

inputs.name: Bank
inputs.description: CV selects bank. 1/12V per bank — responds to semitone steps from a keyboard (C0–B5 = 60 banks).

inputs.name: Play/Rec
inputs.description: Trigger input. In play mode: fires Play. In record mode: starts/stops recording. Rising edge detected.

inputs.name: Reverse
inputs.description: Trigger input. Toggles forward/backward playback on rising edge.

inputs.name: Left RECORD
inputs.description: Audio input for left channel recording. Line-level optimal. Monitored through Out jacks when in record mode.

inputs.name: Right RECORD
inputs.description: Audio input for right channel recording. Always stereo to file regardless of Stereo/Mono playback mode.

outputs.name: Left OUT
outputs.description: Left channel audio. In Mono Mode, sums L+R of stereo files. Mono files always output identically on both jacks.

outputs.name: Right OUT
outputs.description: Right channel audio. In Mono Mode, sums L+R.

outputs.name: End Out
outputs.description: Trigger pulse on loop restart, sample end, or stop. Use as playback-synced clock output.

behaviors.name: Length-zone envelopes
behaviors.description: Above 50% a short Fade In/Out envelope (0–39ms, adjustable) smooths loop points. Below 50% a percussive decay envelope is applied automatically; in Reverse it becomes an attack envelope. Below 1% the output is a single grain repeated — tame buzziness with higher Length or slow Length CV.

behaviors.name: Pitch-independent loop tempo
behaviors.description: Above 50% Length, audio is stretched/shrunk so loop period stays constant regardless of Pitch. Below 50%, loop period tracks Pitch. Use the >50% zone for clock-locked loops you want to pitch-shift without re-syncing.

behaviors.name: End Out as playback clock
behaviors.description: End Out fires a +8V pulse on every loop restart and on sample end. Patch to a sequencer clock input for a sample-synced master clock; patch to Reverse for ping-pong loops; split through a clock divider to reverse every N loops.

behaviors.name: Quantized Pitch jack
behaviors.description: Default No: Pitch CV is continuous, suited to LFO scrubbing. Set Yes to snap Pitch CV to semitones for melodic playback from unquantized CV sources.

behaviors.name: Hidden Channel Volume
behaviors.description: Not saved across power-down. While Reverse is held, Start Pos. knob sets channel output volume instead of start position and the Reverse button will not toggle direction. Returns to 100% on boot.

behaviors.name: Record mode enable
behaviors.description: Play LED flashes red. Play button (or Play/Rec jack) starts/stops a recording into whatever bank+slot the Sample knob is pointing at when recording begins — changing Bank/Sample mid-record has no effect. 48kHz/16- or 24-bit stereo WAV written directly to SD. Hold Bank+Play+Reverse 3s to save slot assignments permanently.

behaviors.name: Pitch jack range clamping
behaviors.description: Knob alone spans ±4 octaves, CV alone spans ±5. Combined range is clamped to -9/+4 octaves — positive CV plus CW knob can only reach +4, but negative CV plus CCW knob reaches -9. Bias for downward pitch sweeps.

behaviors.name: Startup bank persistence
behaviors.description: Value 0–59 selects the bank loaded at power-on, encoded as color (ones digit) + blink count (tens digit). 15 = Cyan-1, 41 = Red-4. Sample list cache is rebuilt the first 3 seconds after each bank change — initial playback latency is ~0.7ms after that window.

behaviors.name: Folder-to-bank color loading
behaviors.trigger: folder name starts with a color
behaviors.description: On boot the module scans the SD root. Folders beginning with White, Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Cyan, Blue, Magenta, Lavender, Pearl auto-load into the matching color bank. Collisions bump to the next blink level (Orange, Orange-1, Orange-2...). Sub-folders ignored — files must be root-level inside the color folder.

behaviors.name: Trigger delay compensation
behaviors.description: Default 8ms. Play/Rec trigger is delayed by this many ms so slew-lagged CV from sequencers has time to settle at Pitch and Start Pos. before playback fires. Reduce to 1 for snappy drum triggering; increase up to 20 for glide-heavy keyboards.

patchIdeas.name: Melodic sample playback from sequencer
patchIdeas.patch: Set Length to ~40% so each trigger plays a percussive slice · sequencer gate → Play/Rec · sequencer pitch → Pitch · same sample replays at sequencer pitch per step · add second CV output to Sample jack for multi-timbral sequencing across 10 slots
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sampler:
* Length: ~40%
* Start Pos: 0

Sequencer:

- Sequencer (Gate) t> Sampler (Play/Rec)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Sampler (In Pitch)
- Sequencer (CV 2) >> Sampler (In Sample)
- Sampler (Left OUT) -> Output (L)
- Sampler (Right OUT) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Self-clocked sample chain
patchIdeas.patch: End Out → sequencer clock · set sequencer to external clock · tap Play once to start · each sample end advances the sequencer which fires Play again via its gate → variable-tempo chain where Length per step controls the beat · patch sequencer CV to Sample jack for multi-slot medleys
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sampler:
* Length: ~60%

Sequencer:
* Clock: external

- Sampler (End Out) c> Sequencer (Clock)
- Sequencer (Gate) t> Sampler (Play/Rec)
- Sequencer (CV 1) >> Sampler (In Sample)
- Sampler (Left OUT) -> Output (L)

patchIdeas.name: Granular scrubbing with LFO sweep
patchIdeas.patch: Length knob <1% so output is a grain · hold Play to loop · slow ramp LFO (0–5V, period several seconds) → Start Pos. · grain window sweeps through file at LFO speed · time-stretch without pitch change · attenuate LFO for partial-file scrubbing · pitch stays independent on Pitch knob
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sampler:
* Length: <1% (grain)
* Start Pos: 0
* Play: looping (hold 0.5s)

Slow LFO:
* Wave: ramp up 0-5V
* Period: several seconds

- Slow LFO (Out) >> Sampler (In Start Pos.)
- Sampler (Left OUT) -> Output (L)
- Sampler (Right OUT) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Random grains (time + pitch independence)
patchIdeas.patch: Length <1% · random source (S&H of noise) → Start Pos · attenuated random/LFO → Length CV · grains play in random order · Pitch knob independently sets grain pitch · separately animate Pitch with slow LFO for cloud texture
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sampler:
* Length: <1%
* Play: looping

S&H:

Noise:

Clock:

LFO:
* Attenuated

- Noise (Out) >> S&H (In)
- Clock (Out) c> S&H (Trig)
- S&H (Out) >> Sampler (In Start Pos.)
- LFO (Out) >> Sampler (In Length) // attenuate heavily
- Sampler (Left OUT) -> Output (L)

patchIdeas.name: Ping-pong loop
patchIdeas.patch: Find rhythmic sample · hold Play to loop · Length 50–90% for shorter loop · patch End Out → Reverse · each loop end flips direction: forward, backward, forward, backward · clock-divide End Out to reverse every N loops for asymmetric patterns
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sampler:
* Length: 50-90%
* Play: looping

- Sampler (End Out) t> Sampler (Reverse)
- Sampler (Left OUT) -> Output (L)
- Sampler (Right OUT) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Shifting ping-pong loop
patchIdeas.patch: Loop rhythmic sample · very slow LFO (period many bars) → Start Pos. · Start Pos. jumps to new position only at the moment the loop restarts — cache refreshes per restart · End Out → Reverse for alternating direction · slowly-drifting window across the file without tempo change
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sampler:
* Length: ~70%
* Play: looping

Slow LFO:
* Period: many bars

- Slow LFO (Out) >> Sampler (In Start Pos.)
- Sampler (End Out) t> Sampler (Reverse)
- Sampler (Left OUT) -> Output (L)
- Sampler (Right OUT) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Clock-synced loop
patchIdeas.patch: Master clock → Play/Rec · hold Play first to enable loop · Length <100% so loop period is shorter than clock interval · sample restarts on every clock tick, resetting any drift · change Pitch freely above 50% Length — loop tempo stays locked to clock
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sampler:
* Length: 60-90%
* Play: looping (preset)

Clock:

- Clock (Out) c> Sampler (Play/Rec)
- Sampler (Left OUT) -> Output (L)
- Sampler (Right OUT) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Drum machine from one bank
patchIdeas.patch: Load 10 drum hits into one color bank · Length ~30% for percussive envelope · trigger sequencer gates → Play/Rec · CV per step → Sample (0–5V / 10 steps = 0.5V each) · one module becomes 10-voice drum sampler with per-hit pitch via Pitch CV
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sampler:
* Length: ~30%
* Start Pos: 0

Sequencer:

- Sequencer (Gate) t> Sampler (Play/Rec)
- Sequencer (CV Sample) >> Sampler (In Sample)
- Sequencer (CV Pitch) p> Sampler (In Pitch)
- Sampler (Left OUT) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: Live looper with instant recall
patchIdeas.patch: Hold Play+Reverse 2s to enter record · patch mic/line source via Listen IO → Left/Right RECORD · tap Play to record, tap to stop · exit record mode (hold Play+Reverse) · Sample knob scrolls takes · hold Bank+Play+Reverse 3s to persist slot assignments across power-down
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sampler:
* Mode: record (hold Play+Reverse 2s)

Listen IO:

Line Source:

- Line Source (Out L) -> Listen IO (In L)
- Line Source (Out R) -> Listen IO (In R)
- Listen IO (Out L) -> Sampler (Left RECORD)
- Listen IO (Out R) -> Sampler (Right RECORD)

patchIdeas.name: CV-slice sequencer
patchIdeas.patch: Load one long sample (speech, field recording) · sequencer CV per step → Start Pos. · sequencer gate → Play/Rec · Length ~20% for percussive slice · each step plays a different point in the source file · pair with quantized CV for tempo-grid slicing, unquantized for glitch
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sampler:
* Length: ~20%

Sequencer:

- Sequencer (Gate) t> Sampler (Play/Rec)
- Sequencer (CV Step) >> Sampler (In Start Pos.)
- Sampler (Left OUT) -> Output (L)
- Sampler (Right OUT) -> Output (R)
